testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions redirectTo should redirect to sign-in route

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should return an object
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should return an object

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should get session from cache
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should get session from cache

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should decode token from session
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should decode token from session

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should verify token time
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should verify token time

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should return valid state if session exists and token is valid
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should return valid state if session exists and token is valid

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should add credentials as session data to request if session exists and token is valid
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should add credentials as session data to request if session exists and token is valid

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should return invalid state if session does not exist
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should return invalid state if session does not exist

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should return invalid state if token has expired and refresh tokens are disabled
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should return invalid state if token has expired and refresh tokens are disabled

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should refresh tokens if token is has expired and refresh tokens are enabled
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should refresh tokens if token is has expired and refresh tokens are enabled

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should overwrite session data in cache if tokens are refreshed
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should overwrite session data in cache if tokens are refreshed

testcase.classname: auth getCookieOptions validate should return valid state if tokens are refreshed
testcase.name: auth getCookieOptions validate should return valid state if tokens are refreshed

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in redirects to /home if authenticated
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in redirects to /home if authenticated

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in redirects to oidc sign in if unauthenticated
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in redirects to oidc sign in if unauthenticated

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc redirects to oidc sign in page if unauthenticated
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc redirects to oidc sign in page if unauthenticated

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should return unauthorised view if unauthenticated but redirected from Entra

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should verify JWT token against public key

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should return error page if token verification fails
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should return error page if token verification fails

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should set authentication status in session cache
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should set authentication status in session cache

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should set user profile properties at top level in session cache
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should set user profile properties at top level in session cache

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should set token and refresh token in session cache
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should set token and refresh token in session cache

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should set cookie session
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should set cookie session

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should ensure redirect path is safe
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc should ensure redirect path is safe

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc redirects to safe redirect path
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-in-oidc redirects to safe redirect path

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out redirects to oidc sign out url if authenticated with session cookie
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out redirects to oidc sign out url if authenticated with session cookie

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out redirects to index page if unauthenticated
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out redirects to index page if unauthenticated

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out should return error page if unable to get sign out url
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out should return error page if unable to get sign out url

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should validate state if authenticated
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should validate state if authenticated

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should return error page if state validation fails
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should return error page if state validation fails

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should not validate state if unauthenticated
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should not validate state if unauthenticated

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should clear session cache if authenticated and session id
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should clear session cache if authenticated and session id

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should clear session cookie if authenticated and session id
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should clear session cookie if authenticated and session id

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should clear session cookie if authenticated and no session id
testcase.name: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should clear session cookie if authenticated and no session id

testcase.classname: auth routes GET /auth/sign-out-oidc should redirect to index page if authenticated

testcase.classname: cache config should return cache port from environment variable

testcase.classname: cache config should return cache password from environment variable
testcase.name: cache config should return cache password from environment variable

testcase.classname: cache config should return password as undefined if environment variable is not set and environment is not production

testcase.classname: cache config should throw error if password environment variable is not set and environment is production

testcase.classname: cache config should return ttl as 24 hours if environment variable is not set
testcase.name: cache config should return ttl as 24 hours if environment variable is not set
